EnumProperty.Name: CrtSysDriverModel
EnumProperty.Description: Select the crtsys entry model for this kernel-mode driver.

EnumValue.Name: Default
EnumValue.Description: Do not select an additional crtsys entry model.

EnumValue.Name: NtlWdm
EnumValue.Description: Use the NTL WDM entry point and ntl::main.

EnumValue.Name: StandardWdm
EnumValue.Description: Use the project's normal DriverEntry instead of ntl::main.

EnumValue.Name: NtlMinifilter
EnumValue.Description: Use the NTL Filter Manager entry point and minifilter runtime support.

EnumValue.Name: NtlKmdf
EnumValue.Description: Use the NTL KMDF entry point. Set WDK Type of driver to KMDF as well.
